requirement_topic.en: Oman Battery / Product Regulation — DGSM Conformity, GSO Standards and Energy-Efficiency Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 阿曼电池/产品法规——DGSM合格评定、GSO标准及能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 阿曼電池/產品法規——DGSM合格評定、GSO標準及能效標籤

summary.en: Oman does not operate a single dedicated battery regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation. Instead, lithium batteries and power banks placed on the Omani market are governed by the general product-conformity framework of the Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Investment Promotion (MOCIIP) through its Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM). Where a product falls within a regulated/controlled category, DGSM requires a conformity certificate or product registration referencing the applicable GSO standard (GSO standards are largely adopted from IEC/ISO and apply across the GCC). Oman also applies GSO energy-efficiency labelling requirements to in-scope appliances/electronics. There is no Omani equivalent of the EU battery passport, carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or critical-mineral supply-chain due-diligence regime; the Omani requirement is conformity to the referenced GSO/IEC safety standard plus product registration through an in-country importer and clearance at ports such as Sohar or Salalah.
summary.zh: 阿曼没有等同于欧盟电池法规的单一专门电池法规。锂电池和移动电源投放阿曼市场，受商业、工业和投资促进部（MOCIIP）通过其标准与计量总局（DGSM）实施的通用产品合格评定框架管辖。若产品属于受管制/受控类别，DGSM要求提供引用适用GSO标准的合格证书或产品注册（GSO标准多采自IEC/ISO，适用于整个海湾合作委员会）。阿曼对在范围内的电器/电子产品也适用GSO能效标签要求。阿曼没有等同于欧盟电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛或关键矿产供应链尽职调查的制度；阿曼要求是符合所引用的GSO/IEC安全标准，加上通过在地进口商完成产品注册，并在苏哈尔或塞拉莱等港口清关。
summary.zht: 阿曼沒有等同於歐盟電池法規的單一專門電池法規。鋰電池和行動電源投放阿曼市場，受商業、工業和投資促進部（MOCIIP）通過其標準與計量總局（DGSM）實施的通用產品合格評定框架管轄。若產品屬於受管制/受控類別，DGSM要求提供引用適用GSO標準的合格證書或產品登記（GSO標準多採自IEC/ISO，適用於整個海灣合作委員會）。阿曼對在範圍內的電器/電子產品也適用GSO能效標籤要求。阿曼沒有等同於歐盟電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻或關鍵礦產供應鏈盡職調查的制度；阿曼要求是符合所引用的GSO/IEC安全標準，加上通過在地進口商完成產品登記，並在蘇哈爾或塞拉萊等港口清關。

standards_or_laws: Oman MOCIIP / DGSM (Directorate General for Standards and Metrology) — product conformity and registration framework for regulated products
GSO (GCC Standardization Organization) technical regulations and standards adopted by Oman (largely aligned with IEC/ISO)
GSO energy-efficiency labelling requirements applicable to in-scope appliances and electronics

summary.en: China does not have a directly equivalent single regulation either. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety) and customs import/export declaration; certain rechargeable battery product categories require mandatory CCC certification under the CNCA/SAMR catalogue for domestic sale. China's own producer-responsibility scheme for waste batteries (under the Solid Waste Law and the 2021 recycling measures) is a domestic obligation. None of these establish a DGSM/GSO conformity certificate, and a GB 31241 report alone does not satisfy Omani product registration where a regulated category applies.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应的单一法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）及海关进出口申报约束；部分可充电电池产品类别在国内销售须依据CNCA/SAMR目录取得强制性CCC认证。中国自身的废旧电池生产者责任制度（《固体废物法》及2021年回收办法）属国内义务。上述均不构成DGSM/GSO合格证书，且在适用受管制类别时，仅凭GB 31241报告不足以满足阿曼产品注册。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應的單一法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）及海關進出口申報約束；部分可充電電池產品類別在國內銷售須依據CNCA/SAMR目錄取得強制性CCC認證。中國自身的廢舊電池生產者責任制度（《固體廢物法》及2021年回收辦法）屬國內義務。上述均不構成DGSM/GSO合格證書，且在適用受管制類別時，僅憑GB 31241報告不足以滿足阿曼產品登記。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic market access for in-scope rechargeable battery products
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic producer-responsibility framework

gap.en: The Omani gap is one of conformity-route and registration, not a parallel battery law. Where lithium batteries or power banks fall within a DGSM-regulated category, the exporter must obtain a DGSM/GSO conformity certificate or product registration referencing the applicable GSO/IEC standard, applied for through an in-country Omani importer; a Chinese GB 31241 report or CCC certificate is not directly accepted in that file. Note: the EU-style battery-passport, carbon-footprint and supply-chain due-diligence obligations have NO Omani equivalent, so those EU duties do not transfer here. The honest mapping is: Oman = GSO/IEC conformity + GSO energy/labelling + DGSM registration via importer; it is materially lighter than the EU Battery Regulation on lifecycle and due-diligence duties.
gap.zh: 阿曼的差距在于合格评定路径与注册，而非平行的电池法。若锂电池或移动电源属于DGSM受管制类别，出口商须取得引用适用GSO/IEC标准的DGSM/GSO合格证书或产品注册，并通过阿曼在地进口商申请；中国GB 31241报告或CCC证书在该文件中不被直接接受。注意：欧盟式的电池护照、碳足迹及供应链尽职调查义务在阿曼无对应制度，故此类欧盟义务不在此转移。诚实的映射为：阿曼＝GSO/IEC合格评定＋GSO能效/标签＋经进口商的DGSM注册；在生命周期和尽职调查义务方面明显轻于欧盟电池法规。
gap.zht: 阿曼的差距在於合格評定路徑與登記，而非平行的電池法。若鋰電池或行動電源屬於DGSM受管制類別，出口商須取得引用適用GSO/IEC標準的DGSM/GSO合格證書或產品登記，並通過阿曼在地進口商申請；中國GB 31241報告或CCC證書在該文件中不被直接接受。注意：歐盟式的電池護照、碳足跡及供應鏈盡職調查義務在阿曼無對應制度，故此類歐盟義務不在此轉移。誠實的映射為：阿曼＝GSO/IEC合格評定＋GSO能效/標籤＋經進口商的DGSM登記；在生命週期和盡職調查義務方面明顯輕於歐盟電池法規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — DGSM/GSO conformity certificate or product registration is required for regulated lithium battery / power bank categories before placement on the Omani market; GSO energy-efficiency labelling applies to in-scope products; no Omani battery-passport, carbon-footprint, or supply-chain due-diligence obligation exists
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety compliance and customs declaration are domestic export requirements; CCC applies to in-scope domestic categories; no Omani-equivalent DGSM/GSO conformity duty exists under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Oman, the controlling requirement for in-scope lithium batteries and power banks is DGSM/GSO conformity and product registration referencing the applicable GSO/IEC standard, lodged through an in-country importer, plus GSO energy-efficiency labelling where applicable. The EU Battery Regulation's battery passport, carbon-footprint and critical-mineral due-diligence duties have no Omani counterpart and should not be assumed. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification does not by itself satisfy DGSM registration; exporters should prepare GSO/IEC-aligned test evidence and an Omani importer arrangement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 就阿曼而言，在范围内的锂电池和移动电源的控制性要求是引用适用GSO/IEC标准的DGSM/GSO合格评定与产品注册，通过在地进口商提交，并在适用时进行GSO能效标签。欧盟电池法规的电池护照、碳足迹及关键矿产尽职调查义务在阿曼无对应，不应假定存在。中国GB 31241或CCC认证本身不能满足DGSM注册；出口商应准备符合GSO/IEC的测试证据及阿曼进口商安排。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 就阿曼而言，在範圍內的鋰電池和行動電源的控制性要求是引用適用GSO/IEC標準的DGSM/GSO合格評定與產品登記，通過在地進口商提交，並在適用時進行GSO能效標籤。歐盟電池法規的電池護照、碳足跡及關鍵礦產盡職調查義務在阿曼無對應，不應假定存在。中國GB 31241或CCC認證本身不能滿足DGSM登記；出口商應準備符合GSO/IEC的測試證據及阿曼進口商安排。

source.publisher: Sultanate of Oman — Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Investment Promotion (MOCIIP) / Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM)
